notes: Core mechanics mostly work but river collision/log-carrying logic is buggy (frog drifts off screen easily, wrapping math inconsistent), and the score-forward check in doLeap compares wrong direction; otherwise controls and visuals are solid.

Core Frogger structure is present, but scoring forward movement is broken, river carry speed is frame-rate dependent, and goal/home behavior resets every level instead of accumulating in a classic Frogger flow.
